name.title: Name
name.description: Display name used by Homebridge and HomeKit.

apiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the WATERCryst myBIOCAT REST API.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key from app.watercryst.com. It is sent as the X-API-KEY header.

requestTimeoutMs.title: Request Timeout
requestTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for one API request.

allowWaterSupplyOpen.title: Expose Reopen Water Supply Command
allowWaterSupplyOpen.description: Adds a separate momentary switch that can reopen the water supply from HomeKit. Emergency shutoff remains available regardless of this setting.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Writes daily statistics to a JSONL file in the Homebridge storage directory.

directory.title: Directory
directory.description: Relative directory below the Homebridge storage path.

fileName.title: File Name
fileName.description: JSONL file name for daily statistics.

stateFileName.title: State File Name
stateFileName.description: File name used to remember the last logged statistics entry.
